pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh target paths.
Task description sums to 15 (4 bottom, 3 top, 8 diagonal) and verifier.py logic.
Task description instruction 7 and verifier.py distance evaluation.
Task description instruction 7 and verifier.py explicit check for single constraint anti-gaming.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a new 2D Warren Truss model from a blank canvas in SolveSpace. The expected output file path is exactly /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/warren_truss.slvs. The verifier enforces exactly 15 line segments representing the truss, exactly 1 distance constraint to enforce a purely parametric design, and a segment length of 40.0 mm.
